questions.question: What is a quadrilateral?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral is a polygon with four sides, four vertices, and four angles.

questions.question: What is the sum of interior angles of a quadrilateral?
What is a parallelogram?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral with both pairs of opposite sides parallel is called a parallelogram.

questions.question: What are the properties of a parallelogram?
questions.answer: Opposite sides are equal, opposite angles are equal, diagonals bisect each other.

questions.question: What is a rectangle?
questions.answer: A parallelogram with all angles 90° is called a rectangle.

questions.question: What is a square?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral with all sides equal and all angles 90° is called a square.

questions.question: What is a rhombus?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral with all sides equal is called a rhombus.

questions.question: What is a trapezium?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral with only one pair of opposite sides parallel is called a trapezium.

questions.question: What is a kite?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral with two pairs of adjacent sides equal is called a kite.

questions.question: In a parallelogram, what can be said about opposite sides?
questions.answer: Opposite sides are equal.

questions.question: In a parallelogram, what can be said about opposite angles?
questions.answer: Opposite angles are equal.

questions.question: In a parallelogram, what can be said about diagonals?
questions.answer: Diagonals bisect each other.

questions.question: What is the property of diagonals in a rectangle?
questions.answer: Diagonals are equal and bisect each other.

questions.question: What is the property of diagonals in a rhombus?
questions.answer: Diagonals bisect each other at right angles.

questions.question: What is the property of diagonals in a square?
questions.answer: Diagonals are equal and bisect each other at right angles.

questions.question: In a trapezium, how many pairs of sides are parallel?
questions.answer: One pair of sides is parallel.

questions.question: In a kite, how are the diagonals related?
questions.answer: One diagonal is the axis of symmetry and diagonals intersect at right angles.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has all sides equal and all angles equal?
questions.answer: Square

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has opposite sides equal and angles equal?
questions.answer: Rectangle

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has all sides equal but angles not necessarily 90°?
questions.answer: Rhombus

questions.question: What is the sum of exterior angles of any quadrilateral?
What is the sum of two diagonals in a rectangle?
questions.answer: Diagonals are equal in length.

questions.question: What is the property of angles between unequal sides of a kite?
questions.answer: Angles between unequal sides are equal.

questions.question: In a parallelogram, what is the relation between adjacent angles?
questions.answer: Adjacent angles are supplementary.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has exactly one pair of parallel sides?
questions.answer: Trapezium
